items.br: View traduzida (Value List) que apresenta os relacionamentos entre fornecedores no Oracle Fusion Procurement. Combina dados base (_B) com traduções (_TL) para exibir tipos de relacionamento (matriz/filial, parceiro, subcontratado, etc.) no idioma da sessão do usuário. Suporta hierarquias e vínculos comerciais entre entidades fornecedoras.
items.en: Translated view (Value List) that presents relationships between suppliers in Oracle Fusion Procurement. Combines base data (_B) with translations (_TL) to display relationship types (parent/subsidiary, partner, subcontractor, etc.) in the user session language. Supports hierarchies and commercial links between supplier entities.
items.es: Translated view (Value List) that presents relationships between suppliers in Oracle Fusion Procurement. Combines base data (_B) with translations (_TL) to display relationship types (parent/subsidiary, partner, subcontractor, etc.) in the user session language. Supports hierarchies and commercial links between supplier entities.

items.br: O sufixo _VL indica Value List — view que combina a tabela base (_B) com a tabela de traduções (_TL), retornando dados no idioma da sessão do usuário.
items.en: The _VL suffix indicates Value List — a view that combines the base table (_B) with the translations table (_TL), returning data in the user session language.
items.es: The _VL suffix indicates Value List — a view that combines the base table (_B) with the translations table (_TL), returning data in the user session language.

items.br: Esta view é utilizada nos seguintes processos:
items.en: This view is used in the following processes:
items.es: Esta vista se utiliza en los siguientes procesos:

items.br: Definição de relacionamentos matriz/filial entre fornecedores.
items.en: Definition of parent/subsidiary relationships between suppliers.
items.es: Definition of parent/subsidiary relationships between suppliers.

items.br: Identificação de fornecedores pertencentes ao mesmo grupo empresarial.
items.en: Identification of suppliers belonging to the same business group.
items.es: Identification of suppliers belonging to the same business group.

items.br: Registro de relacionamentos de subcontratação entre fornecedores.
items.en: Registration of subcontracting relationships between suppliers.
items.es: Registration of subcontracting relationships between suppliers.

items.br: Agrupamento de gastos por grupo econômico ou hierarquia.
items.en: Spend grouping by economic group or hierarchy.
items.es: Spend grouping by economic group or hierarchy.

items.br: Avaliação de risco considerando interdependências entre fornecedores.
items.en: Risk assessment considering interdependencies between suppliers.
items.es: Risk assessment considering interdependencies between suppliers.

items.br: Exibição de tipos de relacionamento traduzidos.
Escala de 0% a 100% — grau de certeza da descrição gerada por IA com base na documentação oficial Oracle (OEDMF/BICC Release 13/25A).
items.en: Scale from 0% to 100% — degree of certainty of the AI-generated description based on official Oracle documentation (OEDMF/BICC Release 13/25A).
items.es: Escala de 0% a 100% — grado de certeza de la descripcion generada por IA basada en la documentacion oficial Oracle (OEDMF/BICC Release 13/25A).

items.br: - 🟢 81–100% — Coluna presente na documentação oficial Oracle; nome, tipo e descrição confirmados.
items.en: - 🟢 81–100% — Column present in official Oracle documentation; name, type and description confirmed.
items.es: - 🟢 81–100% — Columna presente en la documentacion oficial Oracle; nombre, tipo y descripcion confirmados.

items.br: - 🟡 51–80% — Coluna inferida por naming convention ou padrão Oracle; tipo exato pode variar.
items.en: - 🟡 51–80% — Column inferred by naming convention or Oracle standard; exact type may vary.
items.es: - 🟡 51–80% — Columna inferida por naming convention o estandar Oracle; tipo exacto puede variar.

items.br: - 🔴 0–50% — Existência ou tipo incertos; pode não existir no release atual; validar no ambiente.
items.en: - 🔴 0–50% — Uncertain existence or type; may not exist in current release; validate in environment.
items.es: - 🔴 0–50% — Existencia o tipo inciertos; puede no existir en el release actual; validar en el ambiente.

items.br: Nome traduzido do tipo de relacionamento
A view combina as tabelas base (_B) e tradução (_TL), retornando o RELATIONSHIP_TYPE_NAME no idioma da sessão.
items.en: The view combines the base (_B) and translation (_TL) tables, returning the RELATIONSHIP_TYPE_NAME in the session language.
items.es: The view combines the base (_B) and translation (_TL) tables, returning the RELATIONSHIP_TYPE_NAME in the session language.

items.br: Os tipos de relacionamento comuns incluem: PARENT_SUBSIDIARY (matriz/filial), SUBCONTRACTOR (subcontratado), PARTNER (parceiro comercial).
items.en: Common relationship types include: PARENT_SUBSIDIARY, SUBCONTRACTOR, PARTNER.
items.es: Common relationship types include: PARENT_SUBSIDIARY, SUBCONTRACTOR, PARTNER.

items.br: Relacionamentos são bidirecionais: se A é matriz de B, normalmente há um registro inverso (B é filial de A).
items.en: Relationships are bidirectional: if A is parent of B, there is typically an inverse record (B is subsidiary of A).
items.es: Relationships are bidirectional: if A is parent of B, there is typically an inverse record (B is subsidiary of A).

items.br: A análise de spend consolidado por grupo econômico depende desta view para agrupar fornecedores relacionados.
items.en: Consolidated spend analysis by economic group depends on this view to group related suppliers.
items.es: Consolidated spend analysis by economic group depends on this view to group related suppliers.

items.br: Fornecedores com END_DATE no passado ou STATUS = 'INACTIVE' representam relacionamentos encerrados.
items.en: Suppliers with END_DATE in the past or STATUS = 'INACTIVE' represent ended relationships.
items.es: Suppliers with END_DATE in the past or STATUS = 'INACTIVE' represent ended relationships.
